entry.title: PostgreSQL + Apache Doris: Building an HTAP Architecture for Real-Time Analytics
entry.summary: Pairing PostgreSQL with Apache Doris creates an HTAP architecture that separates transactional and analytical workloads at the infrastructure level.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

PostgreSQL + Apache Doris: Building an HTAP Architecture for Real-Time Analytics

velodb.io · Matt Yi2026年3月5日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

Pairing PostgreSQL with Apache Doris creates an HTAP architecture that separates transactional and analytical workloads at the infrastructure level.

entry.title: How Xiaomi Built a Unified Data Platform with Apache Doris
entry.summary: Xiaomi, the third-largest smartphone maker in the world, built a unified data platform on Apache Doris, running 40+ clusters that serve 50 million queries per day across petabytes of data.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

How Xiaomi Built a Unified Data Platform with Apache Doris

velodb.io · Congling Xia2026年2月27日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

Xiaomi, the third-largest smartphone maker in the world, built a unified data platform on Apache Doris, running 40+ clusters that serve 50 million queries per day across petabytes of data.

entry.title: Apache Doris + Paimon: A Faster Lakehouse for Web3 On-Chain Analytics
entry.summary: Apache Doris and Apache Paimon replace the traditional multi-engine Web3 analytics stack (Spark + Trino + OLAP) with a unified lakehouse that delivers 5x faster ETL than Spark and 2x faster data lake queries than Trino.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris + Paimon: A Faster Lakehouse for Web3 On-Chain Analytics

velodb.io · VeloDB Product Team2026年2月12日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

Apache Doris and Apache Paimon replace the traditional multi-engine Web3 analytics stack (Spark + Trino + OLAP) with a unified lakehouse that delivers 5x faster ETL than Spark and 2x faster data lake queries than Trino.

entry.title: How to Build a Real-Time Web3 Analysis Infrastructure with Apache Doris and Flink
entry.summary: Build a real-time Web3 analytics platform using Apache Flink and Apache Doris. This architecture delivers sub-second queries on billions of blockchain transactions.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

How to Build a Real-Time Web3 Analysis Infrastructure with Apache Doris and Flink

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2026年2月5日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

Build a real-time Web3 analytics platform using Apache Flink and Apache Doris. This architecture delivers sub-second queries on billions of blockchain transactions.

entry.title: Apache Doris 4.0: Native Hybrid Search for AI Workloads
entry.summary: Apache Doris offers vector search, full-text search, and structured analytics in a single SQL engine, providing a hybrid search and analytical processing infra solution for AI workloads.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris 4.0: Native Hybrid Search for AI Workloads

velodb.io · Jack Jiang2026年1月20日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

Apache Doris offers vector search, full-text search, and structured analytics in a single SQL engine, providing a hybrid search and analytical processing infra solution for AI workloads.

entry.title: Fast JSON Analytics in Apache Doris: 100x Faster Than PostgreSQL and MongoDB
entry.summary: Apache Doris uses the VARIANT data type to deliver flexible, high-performance JSON handling, thanks to features like dynamic subcolumns, sparse columns, schema templates, lazy materialization, and path-based indexing.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Fast JSON Analytics in Apache Doris: 100x Faster Than PostgreSQL and MongoDB

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年12月26日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

Apache Doris uses the VARIANT data type to deliver flexible, high-performance JSON handling, thanks to features like dynamic subcolumns, sparse columns, schema templates, lazy materialization, and path-based indexing.

entry.title: How ByteDance Solved Billion-Scale Vector Search Problem with Apache Doris 4.0
entry.summary: With Apache Doris 4.0 and its hybrid search capabilities, ByteDance built a search system handling 1 billion+ vectors, achieving accuracy, low latency, and cost-efficiency in infra costs.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

How ByteDance Solved Billion-Scale Vector Search Problem with Apache Doris 4.0

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年12月16日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

With Apache Doris 4.0 and its hybrid search capabilities, ByteDance built a search system handling 1 billion+ vectors, achieving accuracy, low latency, and cost-efficiency in infra costs.

entry.title: Deploying Apache Doris with MinIO: Analytics with Storage-Compute Separation
entry.summary: In the Apache Doris + MinIO architecture, Apache Doris handles compute, MinIO handles storage, and the result is a modern analytics architecture that’s fast, scalable, cost-efficient, and separates compute from storage.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Deploying Apache Doris with MinIO: Analytics with Storage-Compute Separation

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年12月8日

import { BlogLink } from '../src/components/blogs/components/blog-link'; import { SeeMore } from '../src/components/blogs/components/see-more';

In the Apache Doris + MinIO architecture, Apache Doris handles compute, MinIO handles storage, and the result is a modern analytics architecture that’s fast, scalable, cost-efficient, and separates compute from storage.

entry.title: From OneLake to Insights: Building Modern Analytics with Apache Doris and Microsoft Fabric
entry.summary: Connect Apache Doris to Microsoft Fabric’s OneLake, the unified data lake behind Fabric. See how to set up data and authentication in Fabric, creating an Iceberg REST Catalog in Doris, and query OneLake tables without data movement.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

From OneLake to Insights: Building Modern Analytics with Apache Doris and Microsoft Fabric

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年11月17日
Connect Apache Doris to Microsoft Fabric’s OneLake, the unified data lake behind Fabric. See how to set up data and authentication in Fabric, creating an Iceberg REST Catalog in Doris, and query OneLake tables without data movement.see more

entry.title: Apache Doris Tops JSONBench in Cold Queries and Data Quality
entry.summary: Apache Doris has topped the latest JSONBench benchmark. Apache Doris ranks first in cold query performance and data quality, and ranks second in hot queries.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris Tops JSONBench in Cold Queries and Data Quality

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年11月6日
Apache Doris has topped the latest JSONBench benchmark. Apache Doris ranks first in cold query performance and data quality, and ranks second in hot queries.see more

entry.title: Apache Doris Achieves 70% Better Price-Performance on ARM-based AWS Graviton
entry.summary: We benchmarked Apache Doris on ARM-based AWS Graviton against x86 instances across five industry-standard OLAP tests (ClickBench, SSB 100G, SSB-Flat, TPC-H, and TPC-DS), and found Doris running on ARM-based Graviton consistently delivered 54%–70% higher price-performance.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris Achieves 70% Better Price-Performance on ARM-based AWS Graviton

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年10月31日
We benchmarked Apache Doris on ARM-based AWS Graviton against x86 instances across five industry-standard OLAP tests (ClickBench, SSB 100G, SSB-Flat, TPC-H, and TPC-DS), and found Doris running on ARM-based Graviton consistently delivered 54%–70% higher price-performance.see more

entry.title: Apache Doris Up to 34x Faster Than ClickHouse in Real-Time Updates
entry.summary: We benchmarked Apache Doris against ClickHouse on ClickBench and SSB (Star Schema Benchmark), under fair resource allocations in each product's cloud services. Results: Apache Doris is 18-34x faster than ClickHouse in SSB and 2.5-4.6x faster than ClickHouse in ClickBench.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris Up to 34x Faster Than ClickHouse in Real-Time Updates

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年10月1日
We benchmarked Apache Doris against ClickHouse on ClickBench and SSB (Star Schema Benchmark), under fair resource allocations in each product's cloud services. Results: Apache Doris is 18-34x faster than ClickHouse in SSB and 2.5-4.6x faster than ClickHouse in ClickBench.see more

entry.title: Deep Dive: Data Pruning in Apache Doris
entry.summary: At Apache Doris, we have implemented multiple strategies to make the system more intelligent, enabling it to skip unnecessary data processing. In this article, we will discuss all the data pruning techniques used in Apache Doris.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Deep Dive: Data Pruning in Apache Doris

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年9月8日
At Apache Doris, we have implemented multiple strategies to make the system more intelligent, enabling it to skip unnecessary data processing. In this article, we will discuss all the data pruning techniques used in Apache Doris.see more

entry.title: Apache Doris Up To 40x Faster Than ClickHouse | OLAP Showdown Part 2
entry.summary: In every benchmark tested: CoffeeBench, TPC-H, and TPC-DS, Apache Doris consistently pulled ahead, establishing clear dominance over both ClickHouse v25.8 on-premises and ClickHouse Cloud.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris Up To 40x Faster Than ClickHouse | OLAP Showdown Part 2

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年9月7日
In every benchmark tested: CoffeeBench, TPC-H, and TPC-DS, Apache Doris consistently pulled ahead, establishing clear dominance over both ClickHouse v25.8 on-premises and ClickHouse Cloud.see more

entry.title: Data Traits in Apache Doris: The Secret Weapon Behind 2x Faster Performance
entry.summary: At the core of database systems, the query optimizer acts as a shrewd strategist, constantly analyzing data traits to devise the optimal execution plans. Apache Doris, a high-performance MPP analytical database, employs a built-in Data Trait analysis mechanism in its optimizer. By uncovering statistical traits and semantic constraints within the data, Data Trait provides fundamental support for query optimization. Let’s explore its power!
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Data Traits in Apache Doris: The Secret Weapon Behind 2x Faster Performance

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年9月5日
At the core of database systems, the query optimizer acts as a shrewd strategist, constantly analyzing data traits to devise the optimal execution plans. Apache Doris, a high-performance MPP analytical database, employs a built-in Data Trait analysis mechanism in its optimizer. By uncovering statistical traits and semantic constraints within the data, Data Trait provides fundamental support for query optimization. Let’s explore its power!see more

entry.title: Apache Doris Tops RTABench, 6x Faster Than ClickHouse, 30x Faster Than PostgreSQL
entry.summary: Apache Doris, a popular real-time data warehouse, ranked first in the latest RTABench results, setting a new benchmark for real-time analytics performance. In standardized tests, Doris delivered up to 6 times the performance of ClickHouse, 30 times that of PostgreSQL, and 100 times that of MongoDB.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Apache Doris Tops RTABench, 6x Faster Than ClickHouse, 30x Faster Than PostgreSQL

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年9月2日
Apache Doris, a popular real-time data warehouse, ranked first in the latest RTABench results, setting a new benchmark for real-time analytics performance. In standardized tests, Doris delivered up to 6 times the performance of ClickHouse, 30 times that of PostgreSQL, and 100 times that of MongoDB.see more

entry.title: The Ultimate OLAP Showdown: Apache Doris vs. ClickHouse vs. Snowflake (Part 1)
entry.summary: Apache Doris consistently delivers significantly faster performance in large-scale benchmarks spanning both straightforward JOINs and production-grade TPC-H/TPC-DS workloads. On top of that, Apache Doris requires just 10%-20% of the cost of Snowflake or ClickHouse for OLAP workloads.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

The Ultimate OLAP Showdown: Apache Doris vs. ClickHouse vs. Snowflake (Part 1)

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年8月29日
Apache Doris consistently delivers significantly faster performance in large-scale benchmarks spanning both straightforward JOINs and production-grade TPC-H/TPC-DS workloads. On top of that, Apache Doris requires just 10%-20% of the cost of Snowflake or ClickHouse for OLAP workloads.see more

entry.title: Unified Lakehouse with Apache Doris and Paimon: Xiaomi Achieves 6× Faster Performance
entry.summary: Xiaomi is a leading global player in consumer electronics. Best known for its smartphones and smart home devices, Xiaomi is among the top global three smartphone makers and continues to expand into new offerings like electric vehicles. With a global operation, Xiaomi requires an analytical data architecture that can support its growth and increasing demand. Their solution: Apache Doris and Apache Paimon.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

Unified Lakehouse with Apache Doris and Paimon: Xiaomi Achieves 6× Faster Performance

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年8月28日
Xiaomi is a leading global player in consumer electronics. Best known for its smartphones and smart home devices, Xiaomi is among the top global three smartphone makers and continues to expand into new offerings like electric vehicles. With a global operation, Xiaomi requires an analytical data architecture that can support its growth and increasing demand. Their solution: Apache Doris and Apache Paimon.see more

entry.title: Real-time Data Analytics at Scale: Integrating Apache Flink and Doris
entry.summary: In this article, we'll discuss the main technical use cases of Flink Doris Connector and Flink CDC, showing a complete playbook to combine Flink's real-time processing with Doris's fast analytics.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Real-time Data Analytics at Scale: Integrating Apache Flink and Doris

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年8月18日
In this article, we'll discuss the main technical use cases of Flink Doris Connector and Flink CDC, showing a complete playbook to combine Flink's real-time processing with Doris's fast analytics.see more

entry.title: Apache Doris Empowers Real-time Lakehouse in Large-Scale Business Scenarios of Cainiao
entry.summary: Cainiao, the world of e-commerce logistics giant, chose Apache Doris to upgrade its data platform. This step-by-step migration started in 2023, including validating Doris in a mission-critical scenario, expanding Doris's application scenarios, and executing full-scale deployment. the cost efficiency, stability, and operational efficiency of Doris have been powerfully proven. Currently, Doris powers over 25 clusters (10,000+ CPUs) across 3 regions without any failure.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

Apache Doris Empowers Real-time Lakehouse in Large-Scale Business Scenarios of Cainiao

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering Team2025年8月18日
Cainiao, the world of e-commerce logistics giant, chose Apache Doris to upgrade its data platform. This step-by-step migration started in 2023, including validating Doris in a mission-critical scenario, expanding Doris's application scenarios, and executing full-scale deployment. the cost efficiency, stability, and operational efficiency of Doris have been powerfully proven. Currently, Doris powers over 25 clusters (10,000+ CPUs) across 3 regions without any failure.see more
